title: hieracium maculatum var. aurelianense
intro: Hieracium maculatum var. aurelianense is a rare and lesser-known variety of the Hawkweed plant, a flowering perennial native to the mountainous regions of Europe. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The plant's medicinal properties are believed to provide relief from minor wounds, skin irritations, and respiratory problems, such as bronchitis and asthma, by reducing inflammation and promoting healing. Herbal preparations of Hieracium maculatum var. aurelianense include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used topically or taken internally under the guidance of a qualified healthcare professional.
